app.title: vGPU Advisor
app.subtitle: NVIDIA vGPU Profile Calculator for Omnissa Horizon
app.tagline: Select the right vGPU profile for your VDI deployment

tooltips.slotWidth: SW = Single-Width (1 PCIe slot). DW = Double-Width (2 PCIe slots). Affects how many cards fit per host.
tooltips.cooling: Active: card has its own fans. Passive: relies entirely on chassis airflow — verify server airflow is adequate.
tooltips.tdp: Maximum heat output in watts per card. Verify server power supply and cooling budget can accommodate this value.

profiles.noSelection: Select a GPU to view available profiles
profiles.noProfiles: No profiles match the current filter

tooltips.framebufferUtil: Percentage of GPU VRAM used with your current slot config. Higher = more efficient packing. Green = 100%, Yellow ≥80%, Blue <80%.
tooltips.maxInstances: Maximum VMs sharing one physical GPU at this profile size (hardware limit)
tooltips.license: NVIDIA vGPU software license tier required to use this profile

tooltips.pcieSlotsSwMax: Single-width cards: max 6 cards × 1 slot = 6 PCIe slots
tooltips.pcieSlotsDwMax: Double-width cards: max 4 cards × 2 slots = 8 PCIe slots
tooltips.gpuCountDetail: {{cardType}} card fits {{maxCards}} cards ({{totalGpus}} GPUs) in {{slots}} slots
tooltips.gpuCountSimple: Number of physical GPUs per host server
tooltips.hostCount: Number of host servers in the cluster
tooltips.vmTarget: Target number of VMs for the Horizon/Citrix pod (max 20,000 per pod)

density.title: VM Density
density.noProfile: Select a GPU and profile to see density calculations

tooltips.perGpu: Maximum VMs sharing one physical GPU given the profile framebuffer size
tooltips.perHost: VMs per GPU × GPUs per host
tooltips.perCluster: VMs per host × number of hosts in the cluster
tooltips.framebufferUtil: GPU VRAM used: instances × profile VRAM ÷ total VRAM per GPU. Green = 100% (perfectly packed), Yellow ≥80%, Blue <80%.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.showingTop: Showing top {{count}} profiles for {{workload}} workload on {{gpu}}

tooltips.ranking: Profiles are scored by workload fit: VRAM allocation, display count, FPS headroom, and series match. Adjust workload type in the sidebar to change ranking.

recommendations.noGpu: Select a GPU to get recommendations

config.title: Config Snippet
config.description: Add these lines to graphic-profiles.properties on your Horizon Connection Server to register the vGPU profile.
config.noGpu: Select a GPU and profile to generate the config snippet
config.citrixDescription: XenServer xe CLI commands for per-VM vGPU assignment. Profile names are identical to Horizon.

capacity.title: Reverse Capacity Plan
capacity.description: How much hardware is needed to serve your target VM count?
capacity.noGpu: Select a GPU to see the capacity plan
capacity.vramTooltip: More VRAM = fewer VMs per GPU but richer graphics experience. Choose the minimum that meets your user needs.
capacity.noCompatibleGpu: No GPU in the catalog supports a {{vram}}GB {{series}} profile
